---
title: "vite.config.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/vite.config.ts"
loc: 20
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.25
style_score: 9.64
intel_score: 6.00
overall_score: 7.93
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [defineConfig](file://vite)
- [*](file://@vitejs/plugin-react)

### Exports
- `defineConfig`
